title: rosa multiflora var. gentiliana
intro: Rosa multiflora var. gentiliana, also known as Gentil's multiflora rose, is a variant of the Rosa multiflora species, which is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa multiflora var. gentiliana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Rosa multiflora var. gentiliana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
